name: Federated Search & Classroom Presets
assumptions: DuckDuckGo search via duckduckgo-search Python library (no API key needed)
YouTube Data API v3 requires API key — env var YOUTUBE_API_KEY to be added
OpenAlex API uses OPENALEX_API_KEY already in .env
Existing PaginatedResponse model in src/common/models/pagination.py is compatible
Teacher profile timestamps follow User model pattern (inline, not mixin)
Source weights auto-normalize on frontend — DB CHECK enforces sum ≈ 1.0

backend.title: Create ClassroomPreset SQLAlchemy model + Alembic migration
backend.acceptance: Migration runs, table created with all constraints

backend.title: Create presets Pydantic schemas (request/response)
backend.acceptance: All fields validated, source_weights sum check

backend.title: Create presets service (CRUD + default swap)
backend.acceptance: Create, list, get, update, delete, set_default — all scoped to user

backend.title: Create presets router with all endpoints
backend.acceptance: POST, GET list, GET single, PUT, DELETE (409 if default), PATCH default

backend.title: Create abstract SearchProvider + 3 implementations
backend.acceptance: Each provider builds source-specific query from context, calls external API, returns ResourceCard[]

backend.title: Create discovery schemas (ResourceCard, SearchRequest/Response, metadata unions)
backend.acceptance: Discriminated union metadata, counts_by_source, errors array

backend.title: Create discovery service (orchestrator with asyncio.gather)
backend.acceptance: Parallel search, weight-based proportioning, dedup by URL, graceful degradation

backend.title: Create discovery router (POST /api/discovery/search)
backend.acceptance: Rate-limited, ownership check on preset_id, query length validated

backend.title: Register routers in main.py + add config vars + regenerate openapi.json
backend.acceptance: Both routers mounted, YOUTUBE_API_KEY in config, openapi.json regenerated

frontend.title: Run gen:api to generate Orval hooks from updated openapi.json
Install required shadcn components
frontend.acceptance: select, tabs, slider, badge, skeleton, dropdown-menu, separator, toast, alert, dialog installed

frontend.title: Create presets feature — list page + card + skeletons
frontend.acceptance: Grid of preset cards, actions (edit, search, set default, delete)

frontend.title: Create presets feature — form page + tag input + weight sliders
frontend.acceptance: Multi-section form with TanStack Form + Zod, sliders auto-normalize

frontend.title: Create search feature — page + result cards + tabs
frontend.acceptance: Preset selector via nuqs, search bar, source tabs with counts, 3 card variants, error banner

frontend.title: Add i18n translation keys + dashboard navigation entries
frontend.acceptance: presets and search namespaces in all 5 locales, nav links in dashboard
